sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a gift, Gen 32:14, 19 Gen 32:19, 21 Gen 32:21 43:11 , 15 Gen 43:15, 25 Gen 43:25, 26 Gen 43:26, etc.

(2) tribute, which was exacted from a tributary people under the milder name of a gift (Diod. i. 58), 2Sa 8:2, 2Sa 8:6 1Ki 5:1 2Ki 17:4 Psa 72:10.

(3) a gift offered to a divinity, a sacrifice, Gen 4:3, , specially a sacrifice without blood, opp. to זֶבַח a bloody sacrifice, Lev 2:1, , , 6:7 , seq.; 7:9 . Hence זֶבַח וּמִנְחָה, Psa 40:7 Jer 17:26 Dan 9:27.

מנחה

Ch. id. Dan 2:46 Ezr 7:17.
